    STYLE_ART_DECO - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Sleek, geometric decorative style of the 1920s and 30s.
    STYLE_ART_NOUVEAU - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Ornamental style characterized by fluid, organic lines (1890-1910).
    STYLE_BAROQUE - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Ornate and theatrical style of the 17th and 18th centuries.
    STYLE_BRUTALIST - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Style characterized by monolithic, concrete, and blocky appearances.
    STYLE_CLASSICAL - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Classical Greek and Roman architectural style.
    STYLE_GOTHIC - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Medieval European style characterized by pointed arches and ribbed vaults.
    STYLE_MODERNIST - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Style prioritizing function and minimalism over ornament (20th century).
    STYLE_NEOCLASSICAL - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Mid-18th century revival of classical Greek and Roman architecture.
    STYLE_POSTMODERN - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Response to modernism, reintroducing historical reference and playfulness.
    STYLE_RENAISSANCE - Static variable in class org.episteme.social.architecture.ArchitectureConstants
    Early modern style reviving classical elements (14th-16th century).
